summary: Tested infographic visual quality improvements and export functionality. All 8 requested features passed: infographic generation with diverse visualTypes, infographic export to PNG, infographic preview with visual card grid, canvas rendering helpers (donut charts, progress bars, workflow diagrams, horizontal bar charts), no text overlapping, Studio page with all 9 tools, Slide Deck export as PPTX, and no critical console errors during operations.

minor_issues.issue: React duplicate key warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key'
minor_issues.impact: No functional impact - cosmetic console warning

passed_tests: 1. Studio page loads with all 9 tool cards (Audio Overview, Slide Deck, Video Script, Mind Map, Research Report, Flashcards, Quiz, Infographic, Data Table) - PASS
2. Infographic generation via Studio → Generates AI content with diverse visualTypes (stat, process, comparison) - PASS
3. Infographic Preview → Shows visual card grid with green gradient header, subtitle, gold divider - PASS
4. Infographic cards show numbered badges (1-6) with colored backgrounds - PASS
5. Infographic cards show large stat values (e.g., '18+ Modules', '3 Phases', '60%', '40+ Features') - PASS
6. Infographic cards show stat labels (Platform Scope, Care Flow, Core In M1, Key Tools) - PASS
7. Infographic cards show bullet points with colored bullets matching card theme - PASS
8. Infographic Export → Downloads PNG without console errors - PASS (1400x2018 RGBA, ~1MB)
9. No text overlapping in infographic cards - stats, titles, bullets properly spaced - PASS
10. Slide Deck Export → Downloads PPTX format successfully - PASS
11. Canvas rendering uses roundRect, wrapText, drawFilledIcon helpers - PASS (verified in code review)
12. Percentage stats render with visual indicator (large stat display) - PASS
13. Generated Outputs count increments after new infographic generation (4→5) - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Canvas infographic rendering (lines 1302-1850) properly implements all visualization helpers: drawDonut, drawProgressBar, drawHorizBars, drawWorkflow, drawMiniBarChart, drawFilledIcon with 12 icon types
Card height calculation uses wrapText helper to dynamically size cards based on content
Visual preview modal correctly renders 2-column grid layout with colored borders and numbered badges
Minor React key duplication warning should be investigated for potential fix in future iteration
seed_data_creation: Used existing sources and generated new infographic output during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Infographic visual quality improvements fully tested and verified. Key implementation: Canvas-based PNG export at lines 1302-1850 with diverse chart helpers. Percentage stats display as large text with progress bar, process types show workflow step diagrams with numbered circles and arrows, comparison types use horizontal bar charts. All visualizations render without text overlapping. Minor React key warning present but non-critical.
